routes.description: Interactive SVG world map mapping key geographic hubs (Morocco, Portugal, Indonesia) with active spot detail side panels and regional guides.
Customer landing page displaying world class data coverage and top-rated spots today fetched via global rankings API with a limit parameter of 6.
Athlete & Vanguard subscription tiers detailing 16-day extended physics, unlimited watchlists, push alerts, and private API access options.
Regional overview displaying country rankings, seasonal equinox status guides, and local competitive events calendars.
Personalized watchlist interface featuring alert sliders to configure custom swell thresholds and options for delivery channels.
Dynamic SEO-locked page serving metadata and loading the client-side Forecast details container.

components.name: SpotDetailClient
components.description: Main forecast visualizer rendering swell, wind, energy, and tide timelines utilizing Recharts ComposedCharts, showing optimal session recommendations.

components.name: MonitoringInit
components.description: Client-side effect trigger loading Sentry telemetry tracking and Google Analytics PageView trackers.

contexts.name: SavedSpotsProvider
contexts.description: Context provider maintaining and caching the user watchlist array, persisting thresholds to local storage.

libs.name: api.ts
libs.description: Proxy base URL resolver mapping environment configurations to direct REST queries.

libs.name: monitoring.ts
libs.description: Production telemetry library capturing analytics events and forwarding error reports to Sentry.
